recipes.title: Vegetable Sandwich
recipes.instructions: Spread butter, add vegetables, and grill for 3 minutes.

recipes.title: Chickpea Salad
recipes.ingredients: Boiled chickpeas, cucumber, lemon, olive oil, salt
recipes.instructions: Mix all ingredients and chill for 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Paneer Stir Fry
recipes.ingredients: Paneer, capsicum, onion, soy sauce, garlic
recipes.instructions: Saute garlic, add vegetables and paneer, cook for 7 minutes.
